welcome.title: Hello! I'm AIPA
welcome.subtitle: Your AI-powered personal assistant -- writing, analysis, coding, and more.

starter.draftEmail: Help me draft a professional email
starter.blogPost: Help me write a blog post
starter.rewriteTone: Rewrite this in a different tone
starter.storyIdea: Help me develop a story idea
starter.creativeAngle: Find a creative angle for this
starter.breakdownGoal: Break down this goal into steps

message.rewindHint: Rewind conversation to this message's checkpoint
message.rewindSuccess: Files reverted to state before this message

session.deleteAllConfirm: Delete all {{count}} sessions? This cannot be undone.
session.globalSearchHint: Press Enter to search across all sessions

settings.title: Settings
settings.displayNameHint: Personalize the welcome screen greeting with your name
settings.apiKeyPoolHint: Add multiple keys for auto-failover when quota is exhausted
settings.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter custom instructions appended to every conversation...
settings.systemPromptHint: Passed via --append-system-prompt. Takes effect on new conversations.
settings.promptTemplateHint: Select a pre-configured role to set the system prompt. You can further customize it below.
settings.thinkingHint: In adaptive mode, Claude automatically engages deep thinking when needed
settings.maxTurnsHint: Limit how many tool-use turns Claude can execute (--max-turns). Leave empty for unlimited.
settings.budgetHint: Stop execution when cost exceeds this amount (--max-budget-usd). Leave empty for unlimited.
settings.workingFolderHint: Claude will read and write files in this folder
settings.skipPermissionsHint: When enabled, Claude does not ask for per-tool authorization
settings.verboseHint: When enabled, CLI outputs more debug information
settings.completionSoundHint: Play a chime when Claude finishes responding
settings.compactModeHint: Reduce spacing between messages for a denser view
settings.desktopNotificationsHint: Show OS notifications when AIPA finishes responding while the window is not focused
settings.resumeLastSessionHint: Automatically reopen your most recent conversation when AIPA starts
settings.outputStyle.title: Output Style
settings.outputStyle.explanatory.desc: Adds insight blocks after key decisions
settings.outputStyle.settingsHint: Choose how Claude structures responses. Explanatory adds insight blocks; Step-by-Step includes exercises.
settings.thinking.title: Extended Thinking
settings.thinking.description: When enabled, Claude thinks longer before responding. May increase response time and cost.
settings.systemPresenceHint: Inject current date, time, working directory, and user name into every conversation so Claude is aware of your context
settings.promptSuggestionsHint: Show AI-predicted follow-up suggestions after each response (ghost text in input field, Tab to accept)

templates.templatePromptPlaceholder: Enter the system prompt for this template...
templates.emptyState: No custom templates yet. Create one to build your personal workflow library.

onboarding.folderExplanation: Claude will read and write files here. Change it anytime in Settings.
onboarding.readyToChat: You're ready to start chatting with Claude.

toolbar.focusTimerComplete: Focus session complete! Time for a break.

permission.toolMultiEditDetail: Make multiple edits to a file

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.nativeModuleError: The terminal requires the node-pty native module, which is not available.
terminal.rebuildInstructions: Run 'npm run rebuild-pty' in the electron-ui folder and restart the app.
terminal.windowsBuildTools: On Windows, this requires Visual Studio C++ Build Tools.
terminal.basicModeHint: Running without native PTY support. Interactive programs may not work. Run 'npm run rebuild-pty' for full terminal features.

fileBrowser.title: Files
fileBrowser.doubleClickSetDir: Double-click to set as working directory
fileBrowser.chooseHint: Click the icon above to choose a working directory

error.title: Something went wrong
error.recoveryFailed: Recovery failed repeatedly. Starting a new conversation is recommended.

context.almostFull: Context window almost full ({{pct}}%). Consider starting a new conversation.
context.nearCapacity: Context window {{pct}}% full. Enable auto-compact in Settings > Behavior.

changes.title: Session Changes
changes.noChanges: No file changes in this session

cost.thresholdWarning: Session cost exceeded $5.00. Consider starting a new conversation or compacting.

compact.autoCompactHint: Automatically summarize older messages when context window is nearly full

tips.title: Did you know?
tips.tip_shortcuts: Press Ctrl+/ to see all keyboard shortcuts. AIPA has 50+ shortcuts for power users.
tips.tip_model: Press Ctrl+Shift+M to quickly cycle between Claude models without opening Settings.
tips.tip_memory: Save important information to Memory (Ctrl+5) and it will be automatically included in future conversations.
tips.tip_workflows: Create multi-step Workflows (Ctrl+6) to automate repetitive prompt sequences like code review or report writing.
tips.tip_personas: Create AI Personas in Settings to switch between different assistant personalities with custom system prompts.
tips.tip_notes: Use the Notes panel (Ctrl+3) to jot down ideas alongside your conversations. Notes auto-save and persist.
tips.tip_theme: Press Ctrl+Shift+D to instantly toggle between dark and light themes.
tips.tip_language: Press Ctrl+Shift+L to switch between English and Chinese instantly.
tips.tip_search: Press Ctrl+Shift+F for cross-session search -- find any message across all your conversations.
tips.tip_snippets: Create text snippets in Settings and type ::keyword to expand them instantly in the chat input.
tips.tip_focus: Press Ctrl+Shift+O for Focus Mode -- hides sidebar and terminal for distraction-free conversations.
tips.tip_pin: Press Ctrl+Shift+T to pin the AIPA window on top of all other windows.
tips.tip_terminal: Click the terminal button in the chat header to open a terminal that automatically resumes your current conversation.
tips.tip_clipboard: Use the clipboard button in the input toolbar for one-click summarize, translate, or explain clipboard content.
tips.tip_export: Press Ctrl+Shift+E to export any conversation as Markdown, HTML, or JSON.
tips.tip_tone: Switch between Output Styles (Default, Explanatory, Step-by-Step) from the toolbar to change how Claude structures its responses.

autoMemory.enabledHint: Automatically save important information from conversations to your memory

idle.title: Welcome back! You've been away {{duration}}.
idle.description: If you're starting a new task, creating a fresh conversation will save context and give better responses.
idle.dialogEnabledHint: Ask whether to continue or start fresh when returning after 30+ minutes

skills.title: Skills
skills.noSkillsHint: Skills are reusable AI workflows that enhance your assistant. Browse the Marketplace to get started.

followUp.explainCodePrompt: Can you explain the code above in more detail? Break down how it works step by step.
followUp.elaborateStepsPrompt: Can you elaborate on each step in more detail?
followUp.keyTakeawaysPrompt: What are the key takeaways or most important points from your response?
followUp.recommendPrompt: Based on the comparison above, which option would you recommend and why?
followUp.makeFormalPrompt: Can you rewrite this in a more formal and professional tone?
followUp.makeConcisePrompt: Can you make this more concise while keeping the key information?
followUp.improveTranslationPrompt: Can you improve the translation above to sound more natural?
followUp.expandPointsPrompt: Can you expand on each of these points with more detail?
followUp.addToTablePrompt: Can you add more detail or additional columns/rows to this table?
followUp.simplifyPrompt: Can you explain this in simpler terms?
followUp.giveExamplePrompt: Can you give me a practical example?
